reviews.comment:

The bathrooms were very clean; we only stopped to drink mate, and they have a shady area for that. (We only filled up with hot water, and they didn't treat us very well.)

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar muy chico, que casi pasa desapercibido, pero tienen el combustible más  barato (5% menos), el muchacho que trabaja en el shop es cordial, amable, servicial. Las medialunas son muy buenas, y los sandwiches son de lo mejor!

(Translated by Google)
It's a tiny place, almost unnoticeable, but they have the cheapest fuel (5% less), and the guy who works at the shop is friendly, kind, and helpful. The croissants are very good, and the sandwiches are top-notch!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3dkpySVRREAE

reviews.comment:
EXCELENTE!!!! La gente que atiende es muy amable, buena onda. Tiene un sector con mesas y bancos de cemento, con una arboleda muy linda, donde se puede descansar, comer y tomar algo, reponer energías y seguir viaje. Por favor, no se pierdan el sándwich de jamón y queso en pan francés con manteca, simplemente...ESPECTACULAR!!!! Precio-calidad,insuperable. Le ponen muuucho jamón y muuucho queso. Me cobraron 5.000 pesos y comimos dos personas. Muy recomendable. 😉👍👌👏👏

(Translated by Google)
EXCELLENT!!!! The staff is very friendly and welcoming. There's an area with cement tables and benches, shaded by lovely trees, where you can relax, eat, and have a drink, recharge your batteries, and continue your journey. Please don't miss the ham and cheese sandwich on French bread with butter; it's simply...SPECTACULAR!!!! The price-quality ratio is unbeatable. They put a ton of ham and a ton of cheese on it. It cost me 5,000 pesos, and it was enough for two people. Highly recommended. 😉👍👌👏👏
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNiNkpXLUhREAE
